title: FinOps LLM Cost Guard
problem: LLM usage grows quickly across teams, but token spend visibility is fragmented, making it hard to detect runaway prompts, expensive model defaults, or low-value usage patterns.
solution: A cost guard monitors model usage telemetry, detects anomalies by team and workflow, and proposes guardrails such as caching, model downgrades, and prompt compression with estimated savings.

impact.notes: Early benchmark indicates potential monthly spend reduction of 18–25% without reducing SLA quality.
